fukui_charge_conservation_f-: sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)

prose:
Method–provenance summary
Property: Atom-condensed Fukui functions f+ (electrophilic attack), f− (nucleophilic attack), f0 (radical attack) and the condensed dual‐descriptor for nitrobenzene; identification of most electrophilic and nucleophilic sites.
Level of theory: DFT, tier `standard` ≡ B3LYP/def2-TZVP with RI-JK density fitting (PySCF back-end).
Geometry provenance: single-point calculations on the user-supplied Cartesian geometry “/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz”; no re-optimization was performed (DFT//input-XYZ protocol).
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit or explicit solvation).
Charge & multiplicity: neutral singlet (charge 0, multiplicity 1). For the N ± 1 states used to build the Fukui derivatives the skill ran the cation (charge +1, doublet) and anion (charge –1, doublet).
Software: chemkit fukui-reactivity skill (PySCF 2.x engine under the hood, called via chemkit CLI; see command below).
Convergence & warnings: SCF cycles for the N, N + 1, and N – 1 states converged; overall integrity status “ok”, integrity.trustworthy = true.  The engine issued three items with severity “warning” (reproduced verbatim below).  No additional warnings were reported.

Key numerical results (Mulliken charge partitioning)
• Most electrophilic atom: C4 (index 3, para to NO₂)  f⁺ = 0.49641782
• Most nucleophilic atom: C5 (index 4, meta to NO₂) f⁻ = 0.1072882
• Atom-by-atom Fukui vectors (f⁺ / f⁻ / f⁰, dual descriptor) are available in the result JSON written to “/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpzboyesr0/live.json”.

Live log & artifacts
The calculation ran via
/ home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --multiplicity 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpzboyesr0/live.json
Its detailed PySCF/ASE stdout and optimizer progress were streamed LIVE to the `.out` log announced at launch (same run directory); consult that file for SCF iterations and timings.

Warnings (verbatim from tool result)
• fukui_charge_conservation_f+: sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
• fukui_charge_conservation_f-: sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
• schema_header: common header present

The highlighted value (0.49641782) is the largest condensed Fukui f⁺ index and therefore the headline electrophilic site descriptor.
